title: Narmada Tara Vahi Jata Paani
subTitle: Anirudh, an engineer, dreams of building a great dam on the Narmada River, but Pratap Thakur's interference and his love for Jashma complicate his journey.

title: Chundadi Ni Laaj
subTitle: Dharam Singh promises Jamna's mother on her deathbed to get his unborn daughter married to Jamna's son, Mehru. However, later when he breaks his promise, Jamna sets out to execute the marriage.

title: Desi Beats
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of acclaimed chart-topping Indian songs, composed by diverse artists, is played in succession.

title: Chori Na Fera Char
subTitle: Vikram, Ramesh and Arvind are friends who decide to marry on the same day and at the same venue. Their commitment starts to weaken after Himmat Singh creates a rift between them.

title: Desi Beats
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of acclaimed chart-topping Indian songs, composed by diverse artists, is played in succession.

title: Mahiyar Ni Chundadi
subTitle: An orthodox family forces their daughter-in-law to give birth to a boy child at the cost of her life, being only concerned about the continuation of their lineage.

title: Paras Padmini
subTitle: An insouciant man spends his days playing pranks and wreaking havoc in his village. Soon, he is accused of being a thief and sent to jail.

title: Palav Bhini Preet
subTitle: Hamer, a minister's son, and Rajal, the king's daughter, fall in love and wish to get married. However, the king opposes their relationship and tries to create misunderstandings between the two.

title: Dholo Mara Malak No
subTitle: Mohan, a folk singer, gradually rises to fame after meeting Sagita, the owner of a music company. He leaves behind his love, Gopi, in the village and moves to Ahmedabad where Sagita falls for him.

title: Sneh Na Sagpan
subTitle: A young man, who heavily relies on stocks for his earnings, faces several hardships in his life due to the changing trends of the share market.

title: Dharti No Chhedo Ghar
subTitle: A middle-class father works hard to settle his two diligent sons and narcissistic daughter. However, when his daughter returns after marriage, tensions rise.

title: Ekko Badshah Rani
subTitle: Amar returns to India and swaps places with Badshah, his identical twin, when his grandfather fakes a heart attack. However, things get complicated when their third identical brother appears.

title: Desi Beats
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of acclaimed chart-topping Indian songs, composed by diverse artists, is played in succession.

title: Alakh Ne Otle
subTitle: Gomti, a rape victim, dies giving birth to a baby girl, Rambai, who grows up to be a pretty young woman. Years later, history is about to repeat itself when the son of Gomti's rapist kidnaps Rambai.

title: Alakh Na Ajwala
subTitle: A young priest aims to make an example of the King and Queen and punish them when they fail to keep their promise to him.

title: Jaysuk Zdpayo
subTitle: This is the story of a guy named Jaysukh, whose father has left a tremendous amount of debt on him, while he is the sole earner, and he has to repay his father's debt. Jaysukh comes to Ahmedabad city and got a job in a firm. He falls in love with Jigna, his co-worker, meanwhile his boss's sister (Kiran) comes back to India after completing her graduation from London and falls in love with Jaysukh.

title: Lakho Vanzaro
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Maina Popat
subTitle: Gorbha adopts an abandoned child, Maina, giving her a new life. As Maina grows up, her marriage to the mainpulative Pathuba leads to unforeseen challenges and personal struggles.

title: Khamma Mara Veera
subTitle: Asha, an orphan, grows up amidst hardship, but finds solace and support from her brother, a snake god. Later, she marries a kind-hearted man, but is once again faced with the fear of impending doom.

title: Raakh Na Ramakda
subTitle: Separated from her illegitimate son after his birth, Rupa tries to build her life once again. She marries a single father as his son grows fond of her but faces a dilemma when she meets her own son.

title: Mara Sayaba Ni Chundadi
subTitle: Valji honors his promise, leaving his daughter Devi with friend Navin after losing his wife and son. Years later, Devi falls for Raju in college, but their fathers oppose the relationship.

title: Mari Hambhal Lenari Jati Rahi
subTitle: Betrothed in their childhood, a young couple are slated to be married shortly. However, things take an unexpected turn after the bride's father begins to have second thoughts about the union.

title: Marad No Mandvo
subTitle: Twin brothers separated at birth due to a dacoit who killed their father, come face to face as enemies. Soon after releasing the truth, the duo decides to avenge the death.
